name: Herbed Wild Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds fresh wild mushrooms, such as shiitakes and chanterelles (stems removed)
Lemon zest (1 tablespoon, finely grated or to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wipe the mushroom caps with a damp paper towel, then cut into halves.
Set aside.
2. Heat the olive oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-low heat.
Add the shallots, garlic, and thyme; cook, stirring, until the shallots soften slightly, about 3 minutes.
3. Increase the heat to medium-high and stir in the mushrooms. Cover and cook
until the mushrooms soften, 5 to 6 minutes.
4. Add the parsley, butter, pepper, and lemon zest. Cook, stirring,
until the mushrooms give off some of their liquid, 4 to 5 minutes.
5. Season with salt and additional pepper to taste.
